meaning: n.兽群,牧群v.把...赶在一起放牧,成群
examples: She pushed her way through a herd of lunchtime drinkers.
A herd of goats was nibbling the turf around the base of the tower.
With no natural predators on the island, the herd increased rapidly.
On a ridge a few miles away, we spot a herd of 40 grazing elk.
Back on Kimball Mountain, with trigger pulled, the elk herd disperses, except for my cow.
